name: leafsync
description: Two-way sync between a local folder and a live Overleaf project, plus a local sidecar report of Overleaf reviewer comments and tracked changes. Drives Playwright Chromium as the authenticated session host — no browser extension, no passwords. Usable standalone or as a Claude Code plugin.
author: 0110tpwls

scripts.setup: npm install && npx playwright install chromium
